meaning: n.(全套)马具,系在身上的绳子,甲胄vt.上马具,披上甲胄,利用(河流、瀑布等)产生动力(尤指电力)
examples: The vet had improvised a harness.
Turkey plans to harness the waters of the Tigris and Euphrates rivers for big hydro-electric power projects.
You can easily harness the power of both.
Given the cost of building ever larger sea walls, there is an attempt to harness Nature's own defences.
The karabiner, a metal loop, was still attached to the loops of the harness.
